summary: First test pass for Veritas Sphere MVP. Wrote pytest backend suite (23 tests) and Playwright E2E for all critical user + admin flows. ALL backend tests PASSED (23/23) and ALL critical frontend flows PASSED. App is in solid working state.

issues: React hydration warning in console: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>'. Caused by Emergent's dev-tool injecting x-* wrapper <span>s inside <option> elements rendered from PACKAGES map. Not a runtime bug — purely dev tooling. Safe to ignore in production build but visible in dev console.

critical_code_review_comments: send_email_async correctly fire-and-forget via asyncio.create_task — endpoints stay fast and resilient to Resend sandbox restrictions.
JWT_SECRET default 'vs-secret' is overridden in .env — good; production deployments must keep JWT_SECRET set.
Admin seeding is idempotent (find_one then insert) — safe across restarts.
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.

PATCH /api/admin/{kind}/{id}/status uses path-param 'kind' which collides with the more specific export.csv route only in ordering — FastAPI registers /admin/{kind}/export.csv first works because kind=='bookings' AND a literal segment 'export.csv' resolves correctly; verified working via test. Consider explicit route prefixes to avoid future confusion.
Pydantic Literal types (PackageType, StatusType, degree_plan) provide good input validation — verified 422 on invalid package and num_documents=0.
Frontend axios interceptor reads token from localStorage 'vs_token' — confirmed admin flow attaches Bearer correctly and exporting CSV works (download captured via Playwright).

Public endpoints accept arbitrary email domains (test_*@example.com) — fine for MVP but consider rate-limiting POST /contact, /bookings, /applications, /apostille to prevent abuse since they trigger emails.
render_email builds HTML via string interpolation — values are user-supplied; consider HTML-escaping candidate_name/subject/message before embedding to prevent stored-XSS in email clients.
Scholarships are hard-coded in server.py (~80 lines) — fine for MVP. If list grows, move to a JSON/Mongo collection.
test_credentials: Admin: veritassphere26@gmail.com / Veritas@2026 (works on /admin/login). Auto-seeded on backend startup.
seed_data_creation: Tests create transient TEST_/PW prefixed bookings, applications, apostille orders, messages via public endpoints. Not cleaned up (admin can mass-delete later if desired). Approx ~6 records added during this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_veritas_api.py uses BASE_URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL fallback; reuse for regression. All flows verified working: health, scholarships listing/filters, bookings, applications, apostille (price = 1500*n), contact, JWT auth (success+fail), admin stats/list/patch/export CSV/auth-required. Frontend Playwright covered: home, services booking with PS_SOP preselect, scholarships filter+apply modal, apostille form, contact form, admin login → dashboard → status update → CSV download → logout. Resend emails fire-and-forget; sandbox may reject deliveries to non-verified addresses — endpoints still return 200 (verified). Hydration warning in Services <select> is from Emergent dev tooling only, not the app.
rca of the issue: No issues found. App is functioning end-to-end.
